welcome.title: 🏸 Welcome to CLUB Scheduler
welcome.content: CLUB Scheduler helps badminton clubs organise fair, balanced sessions. It tracks your ratings, match history, and lets you manage multiple clubs.
welcome.tip: Start by setting up your profile — tap the person icon at the top right.

set_profile.title: 👤 Set Your Profile
list: Tap the profile icon (top right)
Find your name in the player list
First time — set a 4-digit PIN and a recovery word
Next time — just enter your PIN
set_profile.note: Your profile is required to use the app. You cannot proceed without selecting your name.

join_club.title: 🏟️ Join or Create a Club
list: Go to Settings tab
Tap 'Join Club' and enter the club password
Or tap 'Create Club' to start your own
You can belong to multiple clubs
join_club.tip: Club admins get extra controls — end sessions, manage players.

first_session.title: 🚀 Running Your First Session
list: 1. Go to Players tab — activate players who are present today
2. Go to Rounds tab — tap 'New Round' to generate courts
3. After each game, tap W or L to record the result
4. Tap 'New Round' again for the next rotation
5. When done, tap 'End Session' from your profile

rating_explained.title: ⭐ How Ratings Work
rating_explained.content: Every player starts at rating 1.0. Ratings go up when you win and down when you lose. The change depends on opponent strength.
list: 1.0 – 1.9 → Rookie
3.0 – 3.9 → Competitive
4.0 – 4.4 → Advanced
4.5+ → Elite
rating_explained.tip: You have a Global Rating (across all clubs) and a Club Rating (for this club only).

player_rows.title: 👥 Player List
player_rows.content: Each row shows one player. Blue background = Male, Pink background = Female.
list: Checkbox ticked → player is active (will be scheduled)
Checkbox unticked → player is resting (skipped this session)
Tap the trash icon to remove a player from the list

courts_rule.title: 🎾 Courts & Player Count
list: 4 active players = 1 court
8 active players = 2 courts
12 active players = 3 courts
Every 4 players = 1 additional court
courts_rule.note: Gender does not affect the number of courts.

import_players.title: 📥 Importing Players
import_players.content: Tap the import button to add players from your club database.
list: Search by name to find players
Select multiple players at once
Players are added with their current ratings
import_players.tip: Import only the players present today — inactive players slow down round generation.

adding_players.title: ➕ Adding New Players
adding_players.content: New players can be added directly from the Players tab. They start at rating 1.0 and are automatically registered to your club.
adding_players.tip: Make sure to enter the correct gender — it affects mixed doubles pairing.

troubleshooting.title: 🔧 Common Issues
list: Can't add a court? — You need at least 4 more active players
Player not being scheduled? — Check their checkbox is ticked
Wrong gender shown? — Edit the player and correct it

generating_rounds.title: 🔄 Generating Rounds
generating_rounds.content: Tap 'New Round' to automatically generate fair court assignments. The system balances player pairings so everyone plays with different partners over time.
generating_rounds.tip: The scheduler tracks who has played with and against whom to keep matchups fresh.

courts_layout.title: 🏸 Court Layout
list: Each row = one court
Each court has 2 teams of 2 players
Left team vs Right team
Players not on a court are resting this round

recording_results.title: ✅ Recording Results
recording_results.content: After each game, tap W (Win) or L (Loss) for each court. This updates ratings immediately.
list: W = the left team won
L = the right team won
Results sync to all club members in real time
recording_results.tip: Record results before generating the next round — results affect how the next round is balanced.

lock_unlock.title: 🔒 Lock / Unlock Round
list: Locked — no manual player swaps allowed
Unlocked — you can swap players between courts
Auto-rotation still works even when locked
lock_unlock.note: Lock the round once you are happy with the court assignments.

swapping_players.title: 🔄 Swapping Players
list: 1. Unlock the round first
2. Tap the player you want to move
3. Tap the player to swap with (another court or from resting)
4. Swap happens immediately
swapping_players.tip: Use swaps to balance a lopsided court or handle last-minute player changes.

resting_players.title: 💤 Resting Players
resting_players.content: Players not on a court this round are resting. The number next to their name shows how many rounds they have rested.
resting_players.tip: The scheduler prioritises resting players in the next round to keep things fair.

your_profile.title: 👤 Your Profile Card
your_profile.content: Your profile shows your current ratings, all-time wins and losses, and recent session history.
list: Global Rating — your rating across all clubs
Club Rating — your rating in this specific club
All-Time Wins / Losses — total career record
Recent Sessions — last 3 sessions with match details

pin_setup.title: 🔐 PIN & Recovery Word
list: First time — set a 4-digit PIN and a secret recovery word
Next time — just enter your PIN to log in
Forgot PIN? — tap 'Forgot PIN?' and enter your recovery word
Your PIN protects your profile from others

switching_profiles.title: 🔁 Switching Profiles
switching_profiles.content: Tap 'Switch' in your profile card to select a different player. You will need that player's PIN.
switching_profiles.tip: Useful if you share a device with another club member.

end_session.title: 🏁 End Session
end_session.content: When the session is over, tap 'End Session' from your profile. This saves all match data and updates ratings.
list: The player who started the session can end it
Club admins can always end the session
Data is saved to your profile history
end_session.note: If the app is idle for 1 hour, the session ends automatically.

session_history.title: 📅 Session History
session_history.content: Your last 3 sessions appear in your profile. Tap to expand and see individual match results.
session_history.tip: Today's live session always shows at the top with a LIVE badge.

creating_club.title: 🏟️ Creating a Club
list: Go to Settings tab → tap 'Create Club'
Set a club name, select password, and admin password
Share the select password with members to let them join
Keep the admin password private
creating_club.note: The admin password cannot be recovered if lost. Keep it safe.

joining_club.title: 🤝 Joining a Club
list: Go to Settings tab → tap 'Join Club'
Enter the club name and select password
You are now a member of that club
joining_club.tip: You can join multiple clubs and switch between them in Settings.

admin_controls.title: 🛡️ Admin Controls
list: End the session for everyone
View all player profiles
Manage club membership
Access admin vault in Settings

multiple_clubs.title: 🌐 Multiple Clubs
multiple_clubs.content: You can belong to as many clubs as you like. Each club has its own separate Club Rating.
multiple_clubs.tip: Global Rating is shared across all clubs. Club Rating is specific to each club.

rankings_table.title: 📊 Player Rankings
rankings_table.content: The Summary tab shows fairness rankings for the current session.
list: Rank — priority order for next round
Played — rounds played this session
Rested — rounds sat out
Higher rank = more rounds played = lower priority next
rankings_table.tip: Use this to quickly check if the session has been fair to everyone.

match_details.title: 🏸 Match Details
list: Each box = one team
VS = the two teams facing each other
W / L shown after result is recorded

resting_summary.title: 💤 Resting Players
list: Shows who rested in each round
#1, #2 = number of rounds rested
Colours match gender (blue = male, pink = female)

using_summary.title: 💡 How to Use Summary
list: Check before each new round to spot unfairness
If someone has rested too many times, they will be prioritised
Use it to settle disputes about who has played how much
using_summary.note: Summary is read-only. Changes must be made in the Rounds tab.

forgot_pin.title: 🔑 I Forgot My PIN
list: On the PIN screen, tap 'Forgot PIN?'
Enter your recovery word
Set a new 4-digit PIN
You are logged in immediately
forgot_pin.note: If you also forgot your recovery word, ask your club admin for help.

offline.title: 📶 Does It Work Offline?
offline.content: Partial offline support is available. You can view imported players and current rounds offline. Syncing ratings and saving session history requires internet.
offline.tip: Always ensure you have a connection before ending a session.

ratings_not_updating.title: ⭐ My Rating Is Not Updating
list: Make sure you recorded W or L for the round
Check your internet connection
Ratings update after each round is scored
Re-open the app to force a refresh

session_lost.title: 😟 I Closed the App Mid-Session
session_lost.content: Don't worry — live session data is saved to the cloud every round. When you reopen and end the session, your match data and ratings are recovered automatically.
session_lost.tip: This is why setting your profile before playing matters — so the system knows who you are.

auto_end.title: ⏱️ Session Ended Automatically
auto_end.content: If no rounds are scored for 1 hour, the session ends automatically. All data is saved before it closes.
auto_end.note: This prevents sessions from being accidentally left open overnight.

multiple_devices.title: 📱 Using Multiple Devices
multiple_devices.content: The app works across multiple devices in the same club.
list: Live session visible from any device
Only the session starter or admin can End Session
Ratings sync automatically after each round
